Health & Personal Care Innovation

Real essence of sustainability

Sustainable innovations for active and functional ingredients across nutraceutical, food and personal care markets.

Scroll down ↓

Who We AreInnovation that nurtures life

ROELMI HPC is a global expert in developing active and functional ingredients. With Italian roots and science-driven innovation, we empower formulators with sustainable, clinically-backed solutions across nutraceutical, food and personal care markets.

Contact Us Discover ROELMI
Our Divisions

Two worlds, one expertise

From skin to wellness, our active and functional ingredients serve two complementary markets — each with dedicated science and formulation know-how.

Division 01

Personal Care

Active ingredients and biotech solutions for skin care, hair care and beauty — from hyaluronic acid technologies to postbiotics.

Explore division
Division 02

Nutraceutical & Food

Clinically-tested actives, probiotics and functional ingredients for supplements, functional food and beverages.

Explore division
Our Ingredients

Science you can feel

01 / 03
01 / 04
Biologically active waters

CytoFruit®

Fruit-derived active waters that replace demineralized water. Naturally processed, enriched in oligoelements, with protective and cell-vitality benefits for sustainable formulas.
